_comment: Single source of truth for tier→model mapping (AI_OPERATIONS_PLAN §2.2). Only /research may change a mapping, after verifying the official model catalog. The hygiene routine syncs agent frontmatter from this file. No other file may hardcode a model name.

reasoning.notes: Orchestrator, planner, evaluator, security-reviewer, db-engineer. Fable 5 (claude-fable-5) is a valid upgrade but access is temporarily suspended as of 2026-06-12; Opus 4 deprecation is on 2026-06-15, making the default opus (Opus 4.8) the primary reasoning model.

builder.notes: Routine implementation of one well-briefed feature. Sonnet 4 deprecation is on 2026-06-15; default sonnet resolves to Sonnet 4.6.

fast.notes: Explorer/search/triage fan-out. Default haiku resolves to Haiku 4.5.
